channel.title: Article on Hubert Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Article on Hubert Huang

item.title: Article: The BA Summer Camp
item.description: Introduction to the BA Summer Camp Link to heading “The BA Summer Camp” stands for “the Business Administration Summer Camp”, and it is specifically organized for Taiwanese high school students to learn about business administration and related fields. The Camp’s Curriculum and Content Link to heading As mentioned earlier, our primary goal is to introduce high school students to the field of business administration. Therefore, the curriculum focuses on the five key areas of business administration:

item.title: Article: Introduction to NTU BA
item.description: In the following article, we use “NTU BA” to refer to the department of Business Administration at National Taiwan University. A Brief Introduction to NTU BA Link to heading NTU BA is affiliated with the College of Management at National Taiwan University. Our curriculum includes foundational business courses such as calculus, statistics, economics, accounting, and financial management. We also offer unique courses compared to other departments in the College of Management, such as marketing management, strategic management, and management science model.
